mapper.select:
SELECT f.* FROM sys_flow_form f
f.deleted = 0
AND f.form_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{formName}, '%')
AND f.status = #{status}
ORDER BY f.create_time DESC
SELECT f.* FROM sys_flow_form f WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND f.status = 1 ORDER BY f.form_name ASC
SELECT f.* FROM sys_flow_form f WHERE f.deleted = 0 AND f.form_key = #{formKey} LIMIT 1
